programme.title: Godsend
programme.desc: A couple agree to have their deceased son cloned, but bizarre things happen several years after his rebirth.

programme.title: Skyline
programme.desc: Strange lights over Los Angeles herald the arrival of malevolent aliens who threaten to swallow up humanity.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer is an assassin in love. But a picture-perfect marriage will not save the couple from becoming targets.

programme.title: Bangkok Dangerous
programme.desc: A hitman in Bangkok working a series of jobs violates his personal code when he falls for a local woman.

programme.title: Escape Plan
programme.desc: The world's authority on structural security accepts a job to break out of an ultra-secret, high-tech facility

programme.title: Crank
programme.desc: An assassin learns his rival has injected him with a poison that will kill him if his heart rate drops.

programme.title: Catch 44
programme.desc: Three friends get caught in a standoff with a psychopath, a truck driver, a line cook, and head crime boss.

programme.title: Frank and Jesse
programme.desc: Frank and Jesse James embark on a mission for revenge after their younger brother is murdered.

programme.title: 5 Days of War
programme.desc: A renegade American journalist is caught behind enemy lines.

programme.title: Airborne
programme.desc: California born surfer Mitchell has to spend six months in Ohio while learning love is where the heart is.

programme.title: The Great Buck Howard
programme.desc: Troy drops out of law school to apprentice for Buck Howard, an illusionist whose best days are behind him.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: An ex-FBI Agent and an ex-mob lawyer have to put aside their rivalry on the golf course to fend off a mob hit.

programme.title: The Switch
programme.desc: Best friends accidentally become closer than they ever expected when one of them decides to have a baby.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: MovieSphere provides Hollywood movies, blockbuster hits, and general entertainment programming.
